request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that investing in civil defense preparedness could actually reduce our national security risks? While some argue it's a waste of resources, experts agree that being prepared is the best deterrent. Look at how countries with strong civil defense programs have seen a 30% reduction in security incidents. It's time to prioritize our safety and ensure we're ready for any threat. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
